_source: Grounded in docs/design/component-visual-contract.md (UI need -> Mx component). Keys are UI-kit CSS class names found inside the rendered .phone; values are the suggested MemoX shared component. Values MUST be a real `class Mx*` in lib/presentation/shared/** (verified by tool/parity/symbol_lint.mjs) — a mapping to a non-existent class makes every spec emit a phantom mx: hint, the RC2 drift. ONLY unambiguous mappings live here; ambiguous classes (ov, title, status-dot, muted, field) are deliberately left out so the exporter does not guess. The pill-btn button family is disambiguated in code by the primary/secondary/outline modifier class, so it is intentionally NOT listed here.
_note: Adding/changing a key changes generated specs; re-run `npm run export:specs` after editing. Then `node tool/parity/symbol_lint.mjs --check` must stay green.
_sectionHeadNote: section-head -> MxSectionHeader is a DESIGN DIRECTIVE: no such Flutter class exists yet, but the kit uses section overlines consistently and design is canonical, so the spec asks the FE to build MxSectionHeader. Tracked as a gap in tool/parity/symbol-aliases.json until built.
